author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Starting investigation of pin_memory. In CUDA, pinned (page-locked) host memory enables DMA transfers that are ~2x faster than pageable memory. PyTorch's pin_memory=True in DataLoader allocates batch tensors in pinned memory so that .to(device) transfers are faster and can overlap with computation via non-blocking transfers.

Need to understand: (1) how cudarc exposes host-pinned allocation, (2) how to integrate with TensorStorage, (3) how to wire into DataLoader.
